offer: For corporate event teams processing 5–10 events/month, inefficient coordination causes late bookings and increased costs. We streamline event planning instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Inefficient coordination of event logistics and venue bookings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for event management help
Share insights on Indie Hackers about event workflows
DM outreach to corporate event teams with demo video
Engage in community forums discussing event planning tools
try_it: Let users try event checklist management and venue comparison tool on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
